ios_home_transition_cache_smoothing_foll.details: Patched the remaining iOS home-to-chat transition/cache regression. The chat presenter now uses over-fullscreen presentation and the custom push/pop animator no longer moves the real presenting home view, matching Android's stable home-list behavior more closely. Cached home rows now restore immediately on launch and schedule background remote reconciliation without showing a fresh loading spinner or replacing the list, identical remote rows are skipped, native home reloads preserve scroll offset, and metadata-only cache fallback omits raw preview/message payloads so JSON storage can succeed. Revalidated with baseline and final full iOS simulator builds via `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-transition-cache-baseline CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` and `/tmp/vibe-ios-transition-cache-fix`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeListModels.swift`, `git diff --check`, this JSON parse, and simulator install/launch on booted iPhone 17 where `simctl launch` returned pid 37445; builds succeeded with existing warnings only.

ios_large_chat_nonblocking_open_followup.details: Patched the remaining iOS large-chat open delay by removing native engine queue waits from the full-screen presentation path. `ChatConversationController` now applies a route-only first header/status state before presentation, defers engine-backed header/status/pin/profile refresh until the controller has appeared and the background row read has returned, and disables duplicate list-owned channel opens so the root presenter owns channel open/close. `ChatListView` now schedules surface bind/unbind and channel open/close work on a background serial queue instead of calling `ChatEngine.queue.sync` from UIKit lifecycle methods. Revalidated with baseline `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-nonblocking-open-baseline CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift`, `git diff --check`, this JSON parse, final `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-nonblocking-open-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build`, and simulator install/launch on booted iPhone 17 where `simctl launch` returned pid 20464. Builds succeeded with existing warnings only.

ios_chat_route_singleflight_cache_previe.details: Patched the follow-up iOS home-to-chat freeze path from the device logs. `AppShellCoordinator` now ignores duplicate same-route opens, serializes full-screen chat presentation, drops stale async requests, recovers/dismisses visible chat controllers that escaped active tracking, and `ChatConversationController` falls back to dismissing itself when header back finds stale coordinator state. Seeded recent chat rows no longer mark native history as fully loaded, avoiding partial-history replacement during chat load. Home refresh now shows `Waiting for Network` only for real offline URL errors, not timeout/race failures. Home row cache writes are flushed to UserDefaults, fall back to metadata-only payloads if raw messages are not JSON-safe, and log restore/store counts. Home previews reject ciphertext-shaped preview/content values and use the native engine for a one-message decrypted preview when possible. Revalidated with baseline and final full iOS simulator builds via `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-route-freeze-baseline CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` and `/tmp/vibe-ios-route-freeze-fix`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, `git diff --check`, and this JSON parse; builds succeeded with existing warnings only.

ios_home_cache_chat_preload_freeze_fix.details: Patched iOS home/chat loading to avoid main-thread work during large chat open and preserve the home list across refresh failures. `ChatHomeService` now persists fetched home rows and restores them on cold launch, home refresh errors keep existing rows visible with a waiting-network header, row taps no longer call `makeTransientChatRows` synchronously, recent rows are seeded in the background for visible chats, the first two visible chats prefetch full native history after successful refresh, chat/home requests use an 18s timeout, and the native home table skips identical reloads to reduce flicker. Revalidated with targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, `git diff --check`, `python3 -m json.tool tests.json`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-home-cache-chat-preload CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build`; the full iOS simulator build succeeded with existing deprecation warnings only.

android_ios_chat_theme_chrome_plate_alig.details: Patched Android chat chrome so ChatMainView derives header and Android system navigation bar colors from the same ChatListAppearance wallpaper plate used by ChatListView instead of the app-shell header seed. Android light native theme override now matches the iOS light plate colors (#F9F3EA/#EFE6D9 with matching pattern colors/opacity), while the input bar/root shell palette was left unchanged. iOS native light incoming bubbles now resolve to pure white and render at full opacity instead of a gray translucent fill. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewAppearance.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewCells.swift`, `git diff --check`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, and on-device screenshots `/tmp/vibe_theme_bars_light_after.png` and `/tmp/vibe_theme_bars_after.png`.

native_chat_rtl_status_read_cascade_foll.details: Tightened the follow-up status/RTL pass. Android status glyphs now use a smaller 20dp fixed slot, smaller legacy `Icons.tsx` check geometry, and tighter RTL plain-text padding/bottom metadata spacing. iOS now matches the RTL bottom-meta cell structure for Persian text, uses the legacy single/double check paths at the smaller status size, and the pending clock has one static short hand plus one rotating hand. Android and iOS visible row status resolution now cascades older outgoing `sent`/`delivered` messages to `read` when a later outgoing message in the same ordered list is already read, fixing older rows like `Live 26` staying sent below newer read rows. Revalidated with baseline and post-change `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, full `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-rtl-status-followup CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build`, `git diff --check`, and this JSON parse. On-device install/screenshot verification is pending because `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk` returned `no devices/emulators found` and `adb devices` listed no attached devices.

native_chat_status_rtl_typing_followup.details: Patched Android chat status rendering and RTL layout. The pending clock now uses a fixed 22dp status slot, a smaller ring, one static short hand, one rotating hand, and a smooth alpha/scale transition into the sent/read glyphs. Android sent/delivered/read status now draws the same check geometry as `legacy/mobile-rn/src/components/Icons.tsx`, and Persian/RTL plain-text bubbles use a column layout so text stays above the timestamp/status while English rows keep the compact inline layout. Also fixed Android typing visibility by appending a native typing row when peer typing is active, and fixed Android/iOS typing-send dedupe so blocked first typing events do not suppress later socket sends. iOS pending clock size was reduced for parity. Revalidated with baseline and post-change `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, screenshot `/tmp/vibe_android_status_final.png`, clean `adb shell logcat -d -v time AndroidRuntime:E '*:S'`, `git diff --check`, and this JSON parse.

native_chat_ios_send_queue_and_status_re.details: Patched iOS native chat queue/retry behavior and matched Android/iOS row status UI. iOS `ChatEngine.configure` now preserves same-user runtime transport fields, accepts direct websocket mode, starts Packet runtime when packet mesh is missing a proxy port, falls back to direct websocket if Packet startup fails, treats sent/delivered/read as stronger than visible error, keeps queued drafts for automatic replay, and allows manual retry to move error rows back to pending. iOS New Chat seeds peer public keys into the engine before opening the DM. Android and iOS rows now use an animated pending clock plus an inline retry icon with a small bubble nudge for final send errors. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, sandboxed and elevated `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-send-queue-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` where the elevated build succeeded, `git diff --check`, this JSON parse, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, app launch via adb monkey, uiautomator home-list dump, and clean AndroidRuntime logcat.

android_native_chat_send_queue_replay.details: Patched Android native chat send/queue handling. `ChatEngine.configure` preserves same-user runtime transport fields, the realtime engine starts packet mesh when the proxy port is missing, falls back to direct websocket when packet bootstrap returns invalid HTML, keeps queued messages for automatic replay, moves still-blocked queued messages to a visible error state, and exposes Resend through the resolved local error status. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `git diff --check`, this JSON parse, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, and on-device DM testing. Logcat showed the old `no_native_socket` queue enter direct fallback, socket open/join, queued messages replay with `nextStatus=sent`, and a fresh `QueueLive26` send push and ack with `status=ok nextStatus=sent`; AndroidRuntime logs were clean.

native_new_chat_user_lookup_actions.details: Patched Android and iOS New Chat/find-user handling. Android now searches first, then creates/opens the DM from Message/Add Contact/Call, sends the legacy-compatible `myId`/`friendId` payload, and displays found users as `User is in Vibegram` instead of a UUID. Android and iOS chat-home/search parsers now accept username/displayName/friendName/avatar/public-key field variants and avoid `Unknown`/UUID visible fallbacks. iOS SwiftUI search now shows a found-user action view with Chat, Call, and Add Contact; the UIKit native new-chat parser got the same payload normalization. Revalidated with baseline and post-change `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse`, `git diff --check`, JSON parsing for this file, `adb install -r`, on-device UI text checks for `mohammad`, `User is in Vibegram`, `Message`, `Call`, `Add Contact`, `Added`, chat header `mohammad`, screenshot `/tmp/vibe_new_chat_actions.png`, and clean AndroidRuntime logcat.

android_story_main_edit_refactor.details: Refactored `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/StoryActivity.kt` from the old basic chooser into an iOS-style two-page native flow: a camera-first main page backed by CameraX preview/capture plus gallery import, and a separate edit/composer page with a framed preview card, retake/save/AI actions, caption input, and a richer publish sheet for audience and duration. The same pass fixed Android story publishing to use the real native/server request shape after upload: `media_url`, `media_type`, optional `caption`, `visibility`, and `duration` instead of the old incorrect field names. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `git diff --check`, and `tests.json` parsing. Device verification for the new story flow is still pending.

android_chat_input_separate_controls_fol.details: Patched the Android chat input correction and follow-up regression. Attach, text input, and right action remain separate siblings but now share the same 44dp visual control height; the nested send button was removed; the right action switches between mic/send on typed text; attach/right button backgrounds are filled instead of transparent; the center EditText default minimum height and padding were reduced; row layout transition was removed. Follow-up fixes keep the input container measured during hold-to-record by overlaying the recording UI over an invisible text row instead of setting it to GONE, disable the upward auto-lock/visible lock pill that was jumping during normal hold, keep slide-left cancel, arm reply swipe with a lower horizontal threshold while continuously cancelling long-press, and pin long-press context controls to the top overlay without hiding or animating the live message cell. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `git diff --check` for the touched chat files, and `tests.json` parsing. Earlier device verification confirmed matching attach/input/action bounds and successful Saved Messages send of `CodexInputSizeOk11`; fresh screenshot/install verification for this follow-up could not run because `adb devices` returned no connected devices after the rebuild.

android_chat_home_reply_voice_search_fol.details: Patched and device-verified the Android chat/home follow-up. New chat rows no longer use RecyclerView item/fade animation, saved sends append immediately, native reply previews parse/render and can be started from row swipe/context action into the input banner, home keeps cached rows visible during foreground refresh instead of showing a full-container spinner, home search filters real row fields with focused top chrome and clear action, chat headers use app-theme seed colors, and voice now declares RECORD_AUDIO plus prompts immediately on first mic press before long-press recording. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, adb screenshots for no-spinner home, focused home search, Saved Messages header, bottom send `NoFadeCheck10`, reply banner, microphone permission prompt, and live recording UI, `git diff --check` for the touched Android files, `tests.json` parsing, and clean `adb shell logcat -d -v time AndroidRuntime:E '*:S'`.

android_saved_messages_chat_polish_follo.details: Patched and device-verified the Android Saved Messages/chat follow-up. Saved Messages no longer shows the private-note subtitle in the home row or chat header, uses the filled saved bookmark avatar, hides call actions, exposes search plus clear actions, renders cached saved rows immediately before remote refresh, filters messages through native search while hiding the composer, keeps the composer above the IME, and appends saved sends at the bottom through the optimistic native path. Also removed the unsafe async DiffUtil adapter mutation that caused a RecyclerView inconsistency crash when closing search. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, adb screenshots/text checks for the home row, Saved Messages header, search mode, search exit, and final `LoopCheck8` bottom send, `git diff --check` for the touched Android files, and clean `adb shell logcat -d -v time AndroidRuntime:E '*:S'` after the final run.

android_home_list_swipe_intercept_follow.details: Patched the Android standalone home-list swipe delay. `ChatHomeActivity.kt` no longer nests an outer `SwipeRefreshLayout` around `ChatNativeHomeListView`, and `ChatHomeListView.kt` now uses a horizontal-aware refresh wrapper so pull-to-refresh does not intercept sideways row gestures before `ItemTouchHelper` can translate the cell. Revalidated with baseline and post-change `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin` runs from `android/`; both succeeded, with only existing Kotlin warnings.

ios_reply_preview_status_swipe_decrypt_f.details: Patched the iOS native chat reply/status/swipe follow-up. Root chat rows no longer seed or prefetch encrypted histories; the selected chat builds transient initial rows from the home payload without caching. History/live rows now preserve top-level reply metadata so the first render can synthesize reply banners from the current message list. Status checks use a slightly larger native glyph and scale-only entry instead of opacity fade, and swipe reply tracks the finger direction in real time. Revalidated with `git diff --check`, targeted chat/app-shell `xcrun swiftc -parse` checks, JSON parsing for `tests.json`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-reply-status-swipe-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`. The sandboxed build could not access CoreSimulator cleanly, but the approved escalated build succeeded.

ios_send_morph_reply_large_followup.details: Followed up large-text send morph, reply previews, status icon timing, composer control alignment, and home-card hold behavior. `ChatListView.swift` now defers bottom forcing for tall pending text sends, projects the morph target above the composer during the overlay, settles bottom after reveal, captures reply sends before dismissing the composer reply banner, and synthesizes reply preview metadata from current rows. `ChatListViewModels.swift` parses reply ids/preview fields, and `ChatListViewCells.swift` renders a native reply preview inside text bubbles, includes it in the destination content snapshot, excludes it from the background snapshot, and animates status check icons in with immediate scale/fade. `TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift` delays destination content fade-in for larger height expansion, `ChatInputBar.swift` pins attach/GIF/send/mic controls to the bottom of multiline input, and the home native list now flashes/haptics on tap and exposes a native long-press context menu. Revalidated with git diff check, targeted chat/app-shell `xcrun swiftc -parse` checks, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-sendmorph-reply-large CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build`; Xcode reached Swift compilation and failed only in `actool` because CoreSimulator reports no available simulator runtimes for iphonesimulator.

ios_send_morph_telegram_open_followup.details: Tightened the iOS Telegram-style send/open follow-up. `ChatListView.swift` now positions the send transition overlay above the list but below the native composer and anchors the first nonzero list layout to bottom. `TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift` keeps the destination bubble plate opaque, fades the source snapshot faster, and shortens the final overlay reveal to `0.055s`. `AppRootView.swift` applies route preview rows immediately, moves native row reads and chat-channel opening off the main presentation path, and settles initial bottom scroll during layout. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- ios/ChatModule/TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, targeted `xcrun swiftc -parse` checks for the chat module and app shell sources, and JSON parsing for `tests.json`. `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-sendmorph-open-followup CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` reached Swift compilation and still failed only in asset catalog compilation because CoreSimulator has no available simulator runtimes.

ios_send_morph_tail_status_followup.details: Followed up the iOS send-morph/list tail regression. `ChatEngine.swift` no longer re-shapes history rows together with hidden live rows, so reopening a chat cannot let a hidden/newer live row steal the tail from the last rendered history item; native history rows are still shaped once in their visible history order. `ChatListView.swift` keeps the pending native outgoing shape patch localized and lengthens the final overlay fade to `0.16s` so status icon swaps dissolve from the overlay into the real cell instead of snapping. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift ios/ChatModule/TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewCells.swift`, `xcrun swiftc -parse -target arm64-apple-ios26.0 -sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewCells.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewModels.swift ios/ChatModule/TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatInputBar.swift`, and `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('tests.json','utf8')); console.log('tests.json ok')"`. `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-sendmorph-tail-status-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` reached Swift compilation and still failed only in `actool` because CoreSimulator has no available simulator runtimes.

ios_send_morph_snapshot_match.details: Patched the iOS native send-morph snapshot path for the reported color/corner/timing mismatch while preserving grouped outgoing bubble/tail styling. `ChatListView.swift` now positions the temporary render cell at the settled target bubble rect before snapshotting, uses top-right `8.0` only when the outgoing message continues a same-sender sequence, applies the same localized sequence shape to pending native outgoing rows plus the adjacent previous outgoing row, applies outgoing status updates immediately, and shortens the overlay fade-out. `ChatEngine.swift` now shapes native/decrypted history and live rows as sender sequences instead of emitting every message with `showTail: true` and `borderTopRightRadius: 18`; grouped outgoing rows use top-right `8`, only sequence ends keep tails, history/live shapes are refreshed together after inserts/deletes/history loads, and the history `compactMap` has an explicit `[[String: Any]]` result annotation to fix Swift's `Generic parameter 'ElementOfResult' could not be inferred` compile error. `ChatListViewCells.swift` hides timestamp/status metadata from the destination background snapshot so metadata is not double-rendered with a tinted background layer. `TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift` uses a `0.36s` morph with faster destination background/content fade-in and shorter source fade-out. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift ios/ChatModule/TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewCells.swift`, `xcrun swiftc -parse -target arm64-apple-ios26.0 -sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewCells.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatListViewModels.swift ios/ChatModule/TelegramSendMorphProfile.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatInputBar.swift`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-sendmorph-inference-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`. The Xcode build reached Swift compilation without the generic inference error and failed only in `actool` because CoreSimulator has no available simulator runtimes.

android_settings_home_refactor.details: Refactored the standalone Android home/settings shell. `ChatHomeActivity.kt` now inserts a real `Saved Messages` row into the Chats tab when the API omits it, opens saved messages with `ConversationActivity.savedMessagesIntent(...)`, routes QR/connection/secret settings rows to real native pages, and uses repo-owned XML vector drawables for bottom tabs/settings rows. Added `SettingsDetailActivities.kt` for `UserQRDetailActivity`, `ConnectionDetailActivity`, and `SecretKeyDetailActivity`, plus XML vectors under `android/app/src/main/res/drawable`. Revalidated with `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, clean relaunch via `adb shell monkey -p com.mohammadshayani.vibe -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1`, foreground activity check showing `ChatHomeActivity`, and fresh `adb logcat -d -v time 'AndroidRuntime:E' '*:S'` returning no crash output. UI hierarchy text verification was blocked because the physical device was on Samsung lock/SystemUI during `uiautomator dump`.

ios_shell_story_tabs_privacy_followup.details: Follow-up keeps the SwiftUI `TabView` plus native `Tab(role: .search)` and extends the native story/edit shell. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now presents story as an in-layout leading-edge transition instead of a sheet, hides the tab bar during story/edit mode, colors the home Edit action with secondary/off text, uses the legacy-style story vector, wires home edit selection into existing `ChatHomeCardCell` editing UI, and sends Read/Mute/Delete bulk actions to the authenticated chat endpoints before refreshing the list. The home native list also has a Settings-style top mask layer to cover the header edge. `ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryComposerView.swift` is the legacy native story composer adapted out of Expo into a standalone UIKit/SwiftUI wrapper, captures edited image stories into a rendered media file before publish, and `ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryCameraView.swift` now opens that editor after capture and publishes through `/api/media/upload` plus `/api/stories`. `ios/App/Info.plist` includes camera, microphone, photo-library read, and photo-library add descriptions. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse -target arm64-apple-ios26.0 -sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryCameraView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryComposerView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppVectorIcons.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRuntimeController.swift ios/Sources/App/AppSessionConfig.swift ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeCardCell.swift ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeListModels.swift`, `plutil -lint ios/App/Info.plist`, and `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryCameraView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppNativeStoryComposerView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppVectorIcons.swift ios/App/Info.plist ios/Vibe.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`. `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-story-native-followup CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` reached Swift compilation and still failed only in `actool` because CoreSimulator has no available simulator runtimes.

repo_native_mobile_design_skill.details: Added repo-scoped skill files under `.agents/skills/native-mobile-design/` using the current OpenAI Codex skill layout (`SKILL.md`, optional `references/`, optional `agents/openai.yaml`). The skill focuses native UI work on SwiftUI / Kotlin-native APIs, system components, restrained typography, and the local trade-tauri visual direction. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- AGENTS.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/SKILL.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/references/platform-and-style.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/agents/openai.yaml`.

repo_agents_native_mobile_ui_guidance.details: Root `AGENTS.md` now includes a `Native Mobile UI` section that directs Codex to use the `native-mobile-design` skill, prefer native platform APIs and system components, keep most authored typography restrained, and avoid messy or over-customized native UI by default. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- AGENTS.md`.

ios_secret_key_html_particle_mask.details: Replaced `ios/Sources/App/MetalKeyMaskView.swift` with a Metal port of `ios/Sources/App/gemini-code-1776957543775.html`: secure-input shell styling plus an 800-particle circle-sprite field with horizontal wrap, center-clustered Y spread, wobble, additive blending, and edge fade. `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/MetalKeyMaskView.swift` passed. `xcodebuild -project ios/Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-gemini-final CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` still failed in `actool` because CoreSimulator runtimes are unavailable on this machine, but the build reached Swift compile/link stages without a reported Swift error for the new mask view.

ios_saved_messages_privacy_native_settin.details: Patched the current standalone iOS privacy/settings and Saved Messages regressions. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now uses native SwiftUI `List`/`Section` settings and privacy pages instead of the custom UIKit settings host, the Face ID toggle stays on the main actor, and `ios/App/Info.plist` now includes `NSFaceIDUsageDescription`. `ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift` now skips pinned-message and group-agent fetches for `saved_messages`, `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeService.swift` now injects a Saved Messages row into the home list and seeds preview histories into `ChatEngine`, `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeListModels.swift` now derives friend-name/message preview fallbacks more defensibly, and `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now renders a bookmark avatar for Saved Messages. The server-side `saved_messages` fallback path was also hardened in `server/lib/vibe_web/controllers/chat_controller.ex` and `server/lib/vibe_web/controllers/group_agent_controller.ex`. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeListModels.swift ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeService.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift ios/App/Info.plist server/lib/vibe_web/controllers/chat_controller.ex server/lib/vibe_web/controllers/group_agent_controller.ex`, `mix compile` from `server/`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-privacy-savedmsg-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`. The iOS build still fails only in `actool`/CoreSimulator because simulator runtimes are unavailable on this machine, but it reaches Swift compile/link without a Swift error for the patched files.

ios_root_chat_route_hashable_conformance.details: `PresentedChatRoute` still conforms to `Hashable` in `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` after the root chat presentation refactor, and `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` still passes.

ios_root_level_chat_route.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS app-shell chat presentation regression exposed by `Saved Messages` from `Settings`. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` still keeps a single root `PresentedChatRoute`, but the route now flows through an always-mounted `RootChatPresenterBridge` sibling of the `TabView` instead of a SwiftUI overlay that could mount without visibly presenting. `RootChatPresenterController` now presents `ChatConversationController` full-screen from the actual root/key-window presenter, so chats can open from any tab without depending on the current tab stack or a nested view layer. `ChatsRootView` rows and the settings `Saved Messages` row both still reuse `coordinator.openChat(...)`, and `ChatConversationController` still dismisses through the injected close callback. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`.

ios_root_chat_presenter_bridge.details: `AppRootView` now mounts `RootChatPresenterBridge` as an always-mounted sibling above the tab shell, and `RootChatPresenterController` now falls back to `UIApplication`'s key window when resolving the presenter so a pending root chat can still present before the bridge view is attached to a window. The bridge also logs `makeUIViewController`, `update`, `viewDidLoad`, `deferPresent`, `flushPending`, and `present` to make the next `Saved Messages` repro unambiguous. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`.

native_app_icon_assets.details: Added a real iOS `AppIcon` asset catalog under `ios/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset`, registered it in `ios/Vibe.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`, generated Android launcher icons from `ios/App/logo.PNG` into `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-*`, and updated `android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` to use `@mipmap/ic_launcher` plus `@mipmap/ic_launcher_round`. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-app-icon-ios` from `ios/` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline` from repo root.

ios_saved_messages_route_logging.details: Expanded the Xcode-console route logging for the still-broken standalone iOS `Saved Messages` path. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now logs the root presenter bridge lifecycle (`makeUIViewController`, `update`, `viewDidLoad`, `deferPresent`, `flushPending`, `present`, `dismiss`, and `handleClose`) plus `ChatConversationController` `viewWillAppear`/`viewDidAppear`/`viewDidLayoutSubviews`/`viewDidDisappear`/`didMove(toParent:)`, post-`applyRoute` surface configuration, row-source counts, chat-channel open snapshots, and live view/mainView geometry. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` still logs the settings-row tap, and `ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift` still logs chat-channel open/join behavior including the `saved_messages` realtime-skip path. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` and `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`.

ios_saved_messages_realtime_and_safe_are.details: Fixed the next standalone iOS follow-up where `Saved Messages` was still being treated like a realtime Phoenix chat. `ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift` now refuses to create realtime demand or join a native chat topic for `saved_messages`, keeping that path HTTP-only, while `ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift` sharply reduces the top/bottom wallpaper edge overlays and disables the extra blur that was reading as safe-area bands. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` also hides the tab bar background again and `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now lets the native settings host extend through the container safe areas. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-saved-messages-safe-area-fix` from `ios/`.

ios_chat_push_route_and_settings_spacing.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS follow-up regression where pushed conversations were incorrectly forcing `ChatMainView` into standalone profile mode. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now keeps the pushed conversation controller in normal chat mode, ignores the unsupported profile/agent header actions in the standalone shell, restores `Saved Messages` to the same real chat route, hides the extra SwiftUI navigation-bar chrome on the root settings page, and aligns the tab/root bar backgrounds with the app palette. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` also reduces the oversized bottom/footer spacing in the native settings host. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-chat-layout-fix` from `ios/`.

ios_native_chat_route_restoration.details: Restored the standalone iOS shell to the real native chat surface instead of the placeholder conversation route. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now pushes chat rows and `Saved Messages` into `ChatMainView`, `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` routes `Saved Messages` through the same chat route, and `ios/project.yml` / `ios/Vibe.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` now compile the reusable `ios/ChatModule/` sources directly into the app target. The pass also removed Expo-only base-class usage from `ChatListView.swift` and `ChatMainView.swift`, restored the native image/video edit payload modules, added `ios/ChatModule/LottieCompat.swift` plus sticker fallbacks so the target builds without the missing Lottie dependency, reused `ChatAvatarURLResolver` in `ChatMainView.swift`, and switched `ChatPhoenixClient.swift` to the iOS-safe SOCKS proxy dictionary keys already used by `PacketRuntime`. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-native-chat-route-7` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_old_native_host_restore.details: Replaced the standalone iOS settings root SwiftUI recreation with the old native host pattern. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now uses `SettingsNativeMainViewRepresentable`, and `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now hosts the avatar outside the scroll view, keeps the hero spacer inside the scroll content, and forwards `scrollViewDidScroll` into `setScrollOffset(...)` like the legacy native settings module. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-settings-old-host` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_followup_avatar_row_alignme.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS settings follow-up issues. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now hosts the UIKit row inside a full-width container and applies stronger trailing-edge hugging/compression priorities so the chevron and toggle stay aligned on the right edge, while `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now overlays the reused morphing avatar above the scroll view with a hero spacer underneath so the avatar responds to scroll like the old native settings host. The `Saved Messages` row now routes back to the main Chats page instead of pushing the placeholder conversation screen. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-settings-fix-2` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_rows_avatar_morph_fix.details: Fixed the standalone iOS settings regression where section cards could render as empty space. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now gives the native settings row wrapper an intrinsic height plus `sizeThatFits`, applies a stable minimum row height inside the card, and swaps the simplified avatar header for the reused legacy morphing avatar implementation driven by the settings scroll offset. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-context-resume` from `ios/`.

ios_shell_settings_home_parity_pass.details: Patched the standalone iOS shell to match the old native/RN structure more closely. `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now saves the login key silently and posts a short in-app toast instead of showing the key during auth, `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now uses the old settings row model with profile editing, QR/key views, appearance, media cache, and no root subtitles, and `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` plus `AppRuntimeController.swift` now use the legacy light/dark palette, shared inline top headers, reusable new-chat flow, and empty/list states for chats, contacts, and calls. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-shell-parity-2` from `ios/`.

ios_auth_header_matches_resolo_settings.details: Adjusted `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` so the auth sheet header uses the same plain SwiftUI navigation treatment as the local Resolo settings modal: `NavigationStack`, inline title, leading close button, and a unified sheet/content background instead of the earlier custom toolbar tint that created a visible top edge mismatch. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-auth-header-fix` from `ios/`.

mobile_welcome_auth_refresh.details: Refreshed the native welcome/auth entry flow on both platforms. On iOS, `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now hosts the sign-in/sign-up flow in a Resolo-style SwiftUI sheet with a standard navigation bar, floating inputs, stock close control, and default sheet chrome, while `ios/Sources/App/WelcomeViewController.swift` removes footer blur, shortens the welcome copy, darkens the background toward near-black, and tightens the metal light beam. `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeViewController.swift` now reuses the same modal API for auth recovery. On Android, `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt`, `WelcomeActivity.kt`, and `ChatHomeActivity.kt` share the same bottom-sheet auth presenter and welcome flow. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-welcome-refresh-3 CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`.

ios_auth_welcome_resolo_followup.details: Adjusted the iOS auth and welcome visuals again after comparison with the local Resolo native app. `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now uses the Resolo auth palette and control geometry with a large plain sheet instead of the earlier medium detent, and `ios/Sources/App/WelcomeViewController.swift` now uses a warmer multi-glow metal backdrop so the top-right beam remains visible in both light and dark appearances. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-auth-welcome-followup CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`.

mobile_native_repo_split.details: Moved the remaining native implementation out of `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/`. Reusable Swift source/resources now live under `ios/ChatModule/`, reusable Kotlin source/resources now live under `android/chat-module/`, and the Expo bridge wrappers/package metadata now live under `legacy/mobile-rn/modules/vibe-chat-native/`.

ios_native_build_no_npm.details: Ran `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-native-ios-final CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`. The build succeeded after the native repo split and produced `/tmp/vibe-native-ios-final/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Vibe.app`. The only notable output was deprecation warnings for `adjustsImageWhenHighlighted` and `showsTouchWhenHighlighted` in `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeCardCell.swift`.

android_native_build_no_npm.details: Ran `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug` outside the sandbox so Gradle could fetch the missing Android plugin. Fixed Kotlin compile issues in `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/home/ChatHomeService.kt` and `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ChatHomeActivity.kt`, then re-ran successfully and produced `android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`.

server_connected_app_bridge_tool.details: Added `server/lib/vibe/ai/tools/connected_app.ex` plus `call_connected_app` wiring in `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent.ex`, `server/lib/vibe/ai/tool_registry.ex`, `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex`, and `server/lib/vibe/agents.ex`. Standalone agents can now call a configured app-owned HTTPS endpoint using the integration's existing encrypted secret, with allowed actions sourced from `agent_integrations.routing_rules.connected_app`. `mix compile` passed outside the sandbox and `python3 scripts/test_vibe_trade_notification.py --dry-run` still passed.

server_standalone_agent_direct_config_to.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent.ex` with direct `get_current_agent_config` and `update_current_agent_config` tools for prompt/name/status/config reads and edits on the current standalone agent, made those tools always available regardless of `enabled_tools`, and updated the base agent tool guidance to prefer them over `delegate_to_subagent` for one-agent config work. `mix compile` passed and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

server_subagent_ephemeral_builder_fast_p.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_builder.ex` so internal `delegate_task/3` requests bypass the persisted builder session and run an ephemeral builder execution with empty history when there is no builder UI response, and reduced `subagent_mode` runtime budgets to `max_tokens=900` and `max_depth=3`. Also patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/subagent_registry.ex` so delegated builder/integration calls receive `requester_user_id` and the active agent id, avoiding unnecessary rediscovery of the current agent context. `mix compile` passed.

server_live_shop_agent_capability_probe.details: On 2026-04-08, live `POST https://api.vibegram.io/api/agents/bd35d022-ad48-461a-ac44-f09d165a4232/invoke` probes with the provided secret succeeded at the HTTP layer but the agent replied that it does not have a connected-app tool or store analytics/product-management actions. A second probe for monthly visitors/orders produced the same result, confirming the published agent is still running the old trade/general toolset instead of the new shop-connected configuration.

server_builder_code_first_connected_app_.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_builder.ex` so custom website/app/backend requests now default to a code-side customization path instead of hidden server-side tool mutation. The builder prompt now explicitly offers the code/env setup route first, and the integration payload includes a concrete `connected_app_route_example` plus route/security notes for allowed action ids and `x-vibe-integration-secret` validation.

server_standalone_agent_safe_text_delive.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` so standalone-agent chat delivery no longer dereferences `output.mediaUrl` directly on plain text outputs. The DM delivery path now resolves output fields defensively and `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_standalone_agent_attachment_conte.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe_web/channels/chat_channel.ex` and `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` so standalone-agent DMs now preserve image/document/audio attachment urls, classify common audio formats as `voice`, and append a compact attachment summary to the current user turn before calling the model. `mix compile` passed after the change and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

server_standalone_agent_dm_context_histo.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe_web/channels/chat_channel.ex` to persist an encrypted `agentInputCiphertext` preview only for standalone-agent DMs, and patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` to reconstruct recent DM context from prior agent plaintext plus decrypted agent-input previews before calling `ChatAgent.stream_response/3`. The standalone system prompt now uses `welcome_message` only for first contact and explicitly avoids repeated self-introductions. `mix compile` passed after the change.

mobile_agent_history_plaintext_merge.details: Patched `mobile/src/lib/ChatStore.ts` so `loadMessages()` normalizes full server message payloads before merge instead of rebuilding a stripped shape that dropped `plaintext`, `plainContent`, `isAgentMessage`, `agentName`, and `agentId`. `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

mobile_standalone_agent_dm_routing.details: Added `peerAgentId` plumbing through `mobile/app/chat.tsx`, `mobile/app/chatlist.tsx`, `NativeChatMainSurface.tsx`, `NativeChatSurface.tsx`, `ChatNativeMainModule.swift`, `ChatNativeListModule.swift`, `ChatMainView.swift`, `ChatListView.swift`, and `ChatEngine.swift`. The native send path now caches standalone-agent peer ids, bypasses the human-DM friend-key requirement for those chats, and sends `mentionedAgentId` / `agentText` automatically. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files.

mobile_standalone_agent_voice_note_routi.details: Patched `mobile/app/chat.tsx`, `mobile/app/chatlist.tsx`, and `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatEngine.swift` so voice bubbles sent in standalone-agent DMs keep the exact native voice UI but also include a short `agentText` summary like `User sent a 12-second voice message.` whenever a peer agent id is present. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatEngine.swift` passed.

server_agent_incoming_chat_toggle.details: Added `Vibe.Agents.incoming_chat_enabled?/1`, surfaced `friendIsAgent`, `friendAgentId`, and `acceptsIncomingChat` in DM chat payloads, exposed `acceptsIncomingChat` on user payloads, added `incoming_chat_enabled` to builder agent cards, and made `ChatChannel` reject DM sends when standalone-agent incoming chat is disabled. `mix compile` passed.

ios_native_agent_incoming_chat_control.details: Extended `ChatListRow.AgentCard` and `ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` with an `Incoming Chat` control that updates `approval_rules["chat_input"]["enabled"]` while preserving the existing `event_inbox` settings. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files.

server_event_html_normalization.details:
Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_event_runtime.ex` so event titles, texts, and attachment captions normalize HTML-like markup (``, `
`, closing block tags, common entities, and numeric entities) into plain text before persistence and posting. Followed up by fixing the numeric-entity decoder to call `Regex.replace/4` with the correct `regex, string, replacement` order after a live `/events` request exposed a `FunctionClauseError` on plain titles like `OPEN EURUSD`. `mix compile` passed after the fix.

server_event_inbox_tools_and_batch_mode.details: Added owner-only standalone-agent tools `query_event_inbox` and `configure_event_inbox`, passed `agent_id`/`requester_user_id` through the standalone chat runtime, and added batched summary posting backed by `approval_rules["event_inbox"]` / integration routing rules in `AgentEventRuntime`. `mix compile` passed after the change.

mobile_native_related_message_navigation.details: Parsed related-message metadata into `ChatListRow`, rendered a native inline related-messages card, emitted a `relatedMessagesPressed` event from `ChatListView`, and reused the existing global banner/jump path in `ChatListScreen.tsx`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewCells.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListView.swift` passed, and `git diff --check` passed.

external_trade_runtime_vibe_notification.details: Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/tradeai/trading_robot/config/settings.py` to include `vibe` in `notification_channels`, and patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/tradeai/trading_robot/utils/notifications.py` so `VibeNotifier` defaults to `https://api.vibegram.io`, normalizes a full `/api/agents/...` URL back to the API base, and sends the same `User-Agent` and JSON headers as the working smoke test. `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache python3 -m py_compile ...` passed.

trade_connected_app_actions_endpoint.details: Added `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/client/app/api/vibe/agent-actions/route.ts`, which validates `x-vibe-integration-secret` and serves the explicit safe actions `app.describe`, `website.summary`, `website.funnel.summary`, `website.live_presence`, `waitlist.summary`, and `engine.usage.summary` using Supabase admin reads with existing in-memory-store fallback. `./node_modules/.bin/eslint app/api/vibe/agent-actions/route.ts` passed in `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/client`.

trade_signal_only_vibe_agent_routing.details: Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/utils/notification_integration.py` so signal generation now emits a compact `signals` notification batch through the Vibe channel, routing signal-only flows through the same agent destination instead of relying on Telegram-only behavior. `git diff --check` passed for the touched trade files and `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache python3 -m py_compile ...` passed.

trade_vibe_plaintext_notification_render.details:
Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/utils/comprehensive_notifications.py` so the Vibe channel strips HTML tags, converts `
` and block tags into newlines, unescapes entities, and posts plain text to Vibe. `git diff --check` passed and the patched Python files compiled successfully.

server_chat_list_agent_display_name.details: Patched `Vibe.Chat.list_chats_uncached/1` so DM rows whose peer is an agent shadow user now resolve `friendName` from the owning agent `display_name` and prefer the agent avatar for `friendImage`, instead of exposing the shadow username/invoke-style id. `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_mix_test.details: Command failed because server/config/test.exs is missing.

server_mix_compile.details: Compiled successfully after the connected-app bridge patch; only pre-existing warnings were reported.

server_builder_destination_chat_tool.details: Added builder tool `ensure_destination_chat`, shared `Chat.ensure_dm_chat/2`, and DM-only chat resolution so the standalone agent can create/reuse a real attached DM chat and return its chat id.

server_builder_destination_chat_validati.details: Added builder tool `validate_destination_chat` so the standalone agent re-checks live attached/default destination chats, compares a provided chat id against current owner-visible state, repairs stale default destinations when needed, and explains why the same DM id can still be correct.

server_builder_agent_naming.details: The standalone builder now infers a practical creation-time `display_name` from the provided workflow description/persona when the tool input omitted a name, and the builder prompt now requires explicit `display_name` usage for create/rename requests. `mix compile` passed after the backend change.

server_agent_message_push_notifications.details: Patched `AgentEventRuntime` and `GroupAgent` so agent-originated messages now restore deleted chats if needed, broadcast `user:new_message`, and call `Notifications.send_message_push/2` for unmuted participants just like normal user messages. `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_live_event_delivery_debug.details: Live curl to `/api/agents/:identifier/events` returned `200` with `messagePosted: true`; authenticated live GET `/api/chat/73928163c120/messages` and `/api/chats/:user_id` both confirmed the agent event message is present in chat `73928163c120` and that chat is in the owner-visible home list API payload.

server_owner_visible_attached_chats.details: Owner-facing attached/default destination chats now only include chats shared by both the agent shadow user and the owner, preventing the builder from returning invisible-but-writable chat ids.

server_builder_struct_sanitization.details: Builder payload sanitization now compiles with explicit handling for DateTime, NaiveDateTime, Date, Time, Decimal, and fallback structs.

server_agent_secret_endpoint.details: The authenticated GET /api/agents/:id/secret route compiles and returns the decrypted callback signing secret for the owning user.

mobile_git_diff_check.details: git diff --check passed for the modified native agent view, config panel, notes files, and agent secret endpoint files.

mobile_typescript_check.details: `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` reports existing repo-wide TypeScript errors outside the touched native agent files, including FlashList typing, NativeChatAppearance shape, old temp files, and relay typing issues.

ios_native_validation.details: The latest iOS follow-up revalidated cleanly. `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift` passed, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift` passed, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded from `ios/`. A full simulator install/launch pass was still not run in this session.

ios_app_boot_verification.details: Could not complete a full simulator boot/install/launch verification in this session. The latest `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded, the built `.app` exists under `~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Vibe-fnzhwyvbbieesmbtzbicdjofxhuo/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Vibe.app`, and an unsandboxed `xcrun simctl boot B8813178-BB99-4D2A-97AD-153E9CD0D7CE` request succeeded, but the follow-up unsandboxed `simctl install` / `simctl launch` requests were rejected.

ios_native_home_debug_logging.details: Added targeted native logging to ChatNativeHomeModule.fetchChats, ChatNativeHomeListView.setRows/didChange, and ChatEngine.postChangeLocked. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files and `git diff --check` passed for the touched mobile files.

ios_native_agent_config_rename.details: The native standalone agent config panel now exposes a `Name` row that opens a native rename alert and saves through `PUT /api/agents/:id`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift` passed.

ios_native_agent_prompt_edit_control.details: Patched `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` so the `Prompt` row always appears, shows a condensed preview, opens an editable native prompt editor, and saves `system_prompt` through `PUT /api/agents/:id`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift` passed, and `git diff --check -- mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` passed.

ios_native_agent_inbox_mode_control.details: Extended agent cards with `event_inbox_mode` / `summary_window_hours`, surfaced an `Inbox Mode` row in `ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift`, and wired it to `PUT /api/agents/:id` with `approval_rules["event_inbox"]` choices for event bubbles, 4h batch summaries, and daily summaries. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentView.swift` passed, and `mix compile` passed.

web_agent_config_docs_route.details: Added a dedicated web doc page at `client/src/pages/AgentConfigDocs.tsx`, routed it through `client/src/App.tsx` at `/docs/agents/config`, updated the shared docs header to handle config-doc anchors, and linked the main agent docs page into the new config reference.

web_agent_docs_sidebar_suite.details: Reworked the standalone agent docs into a sidebar-driven docs shell with focused pages for overview, config, examples, and env/setup. Added `client/src/components/docs/DocsShell.tsx`, `client/src/pages/AgentExamplesDocs.tsx`, `client/src/pages/AgentEnvDocs.tsx`, `client/src/pages/agentDocsShared.ts`, rewired `client/src/App.tsx`, and replaced `client/src/pages/AgentDocs.css` with the new sidebar/scroll layout.

web_client_bundle_for_phoenix_root.details: Updated the root `Dockerfile` to build the React client in a Node stage and copy `client/dist` into `server/priv/static` before the Phoenix release build. Re-ran `npm run build` and `npm run build -- --outDir ../server/priv/static` from `client/`, both of which succeeded and regenerated the landing/docs bundle for the Phoenix-served root.

mobile_chatstore_realtime_reload_logging.details: Added unconditional ChatStore logs for `user:new_chat`, `user:new_message`, forced `scheduleLoadChats`, and `loadChats(forceRemote)` cache-bypass decisions so the next device run will show whether realtime is triggering the remote `/chats` refresh path.

mobile_chatstore_cached_start_reconcile.details: When cached chats already exist, `loadChats()` now schedules one short background remote reconciliation instead of only returning the hydrated list forever. Starting any real remote reload clears the pending timer and refresh cooldown to avoid duplicate fetches. `git diff --check -- mobile/src/lib/ChatStore.ts` passed, and `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` still fails only with pre-existing repo-wide errors outside `ChatStore.ts`.

mobile_saved_messages_media_placeholder_.details: Patched `mobile/app/saved-messages.tsx` so saved image/video/voice/location rows no longer inject placeholder text like `Image` or `Video`, existing saved-media placeholders are suppressed in the row mapper/render path, and `mobile/src/native/chat/types.ts` now declares `bubbleThemGradient` to match existing chat appearance usage. `get_errors` reported no errors in the touched files after the change.

ios_native_chat_timestamp_parser_scroll_.details: Patched `mobile/src/native/chat/mapper.ts` to normalize native row timestamps back to `HH:mm`, updated `ChatListViewCells.swift` to use `ChatNativeAgentTextRenderer` for agent and mention bubble text, softened the main header blur/mask in `ChatMainView.swift`, forced bottom scroll for pending sends plus resize-safe inset ordering in `ChatListView.swift`, and skipped redundant inset rewrites in `ChatNativeHomeListView.swift`. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files, `get_errors` reported no file-level errors, and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

ios_native_chat_block_renderer_link_prev.details: Patched `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewCells.swift`, `ChatListView.swift`, `ChatNativeAgentStreamingText.swift`, and `ChatNativeAgentMessagesView.swift` so main-chat agent bubbles now render fenced code blocks with `AgentCodeBlockView`, default text bubbles use the shared markdown/link renderer, external text links render a cached fixed-height native preview card via `LPMetadataProvider`, and code-block expansion invalidates the list layout while preserving scroll position. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files and `get_errors` reported no file-level errors.

ios_native_agent_code_block_storage_key_.details: Fixed `AgentCodeBlockView.isExpanded(...)` in `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentStreamingText.swift` by qualifying the static helper call as `Self.storageKey(...)` so the `storageKey` parameter no longer shadows the helper and triggers `Cannot call value of non-function type 'String?'`. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed and `get_errors` reported no file-level errors after the patch.

ios_native_theme_preset_pass_through.details: Removed the unsupported custom wallpaper controller from `ios/Sources/App/AppRuntimeController.swift`, restored `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` to pass `nativeThemeId` plus `nativeThemeIsDark` into the native chat appearance payload, and returned `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` to the supported appearance controls that map to the existing theme plates. `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRuntimeController.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` passed, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRuntimeController.swift ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` passed, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded from `ios/`.

ios_settings_avatar_native_header_isolat.details: Reworked the iOS settings root after the first native-header workaround. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now keeps the root QR/Edit actions in the SwiftUI toolbar again, while `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` isolates the avatar hero below the nav bar, removes the header-attached glass artifact, and adds stronger native row press feedback so the avatar no longer intersects the toolbar masking/compositing path. `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` passed, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` passed, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded from `ios/`.

ios_shell_followup_connected_empty_state.details: The same iOS follow-up updated `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` and `ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift` so the home header can reach a real connected state, list previews derive from preview rows before falling back, empty states use the bundled cat Lottie treatment with tighter copy, the Settings tab falls back to a person glyph instead of an empty circle, and the main chat no longer shows sticky `connecting...` when presence/history context already exists. `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift` passed, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift ios/ChatModule/ChatMainView.swift` passed, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded from `ios/`.

android_native_chat_module_migration.details: Migrated the real Android native chat module into the standalone app package without Expo dependencies, replaced the basic conversation screen with ChatMainView, routed ChatHomeActivity through the migrated native home list, added a native New Chat dialog backed by user lookup plus POST /api/chat, matched the new-chat/story icons to the legacy paths, forced bottom tab labels visible with neutral active tint, and fixed standalone Saved Messages composer insets/input hit testing. Revalidated with ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin, ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug, adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk, uiautomator text checks for Chats/Search/Saved Messages/Contacts/Calls/Settings/New Chat, a Saved Messages send rendering CodexAndroidCheck9 with timestamp 12:35 PM, and empty adb AndroidRuntime crash logs.

android_four_tab_shell_and_read_only_cha.details: Reworked the standalone Android app into a native four-tab shell. `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ChatHomeActivity.kt` now hosts `Contacts`, `Calls`, `Chats`, and `Settings` with a native bottom navigation bar and shared root content host; `ConversationActivity.kt` now opens a root-level read-only conversation surface for chat rows and saved messages using the authenticated `/api/chat/:chat_id/messages` or `/api/saved_messages/:user_id` endpoints; and `ChatHomeListModels.kt` now derives preview text from preview rows before falling back to empty copy. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ChatHomeActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ConversationActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/home/ChatHomeListModels.kt` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`.

android_appearance_and_auth_shell_routin.details: Added app-side Android appearance parity with `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AppTheme.kt` plus `AppearanceSettingsActivity.kt`, mirroring the iOS mode/plate model and syncing the selected plate into the existing native chat preference keys. `MainActivity.kt`, `AuthActivity.kt`, and `WelcomeActivity.kt` now apply the stored appearance before rendering, and the shell/settings flow continues to land in `ChatHomeActivity.kt` after auth. `android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` now registers the new appearance and conversation activities. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/MainActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AppTheme.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AppearanceSettingsActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/WelcomeActivity.kt android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`.

android_auth_bottom_sheet_crash_fix_and_.details: Fixed the standalone Android auth crash by attaching the `TextInputEditText` inside `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt` with `LinearLayout.LayoutParams` instead of a generic `ViewGroup.LayoutParams`, which stops the `ClassCastException` thrown as soon as the bottom sheet measured. The same pass aligned the Android welcome/auth copy in `AuthActivity.kt` and `WelcomeActivity.kt` with the current iOS strings. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/WelcomeActivity.kt`, `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, and unsandboxed `adb` verification on the connected Samsung device. The exact `Sign In` and `Create Account` flows that previously crashed now open as slide-up bottom sheets without a fatal exception.

android_gpu_welcome_surface_and_ios_secr.details: Reworked the Android welcome/auth surface around a GPU-backed renderer and iOS-style secret persistence. `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/WelcomeGpuBackdropView.kt` now renders the welcome/auth background through `GLSurfaceView` + OpenGL ES with a darker top-right light source, `WelcomeActivity.kt` now keeps the copy near center with smaller type and a three-word `Light in darkness.` word-by-word animation, `AuthActivity.kt` now uses a translate-only window animation plus a forced ~90vh bottom sheet and stores `loginSecret` after sign-in/sign-up instead of blocking on a recovery dialog, `ChatHomeActivity.kt` now exposes a `Secret Key` settings row, and `SecureKeyStore.kt` now clears `loginSecret` on sign-out. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/WelcomeActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/WelcomeGpuBackdropView.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ChatHomeActivity.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/storage/SecureKeyStore.kt android/app/src/main/res/values/themes.xml android/app/src/main/res/anim/vibe_sheet_slide_up.xml android/app/src/main/res/anim/vibe_sheet_slide_down.xml`, `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`, `adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`, `adb shell monkey -p com.mohammadshayani.vibe -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1`, and on-device `uiautomator dump` checks on the connected Samsung. The live UI tree showed the new centered welcome copy and a `design_bottom_sheet` frame at `[0,232][1080,2316]`, and `adb logcat -d AndroidRuntime:E '*:S'` stayed empty after opening both auth modes. A real successful sign-up/sign-in against the live backend was not executed in this pass.
